_meta.description: Style configuration for teaching and workshop facilitation. Invitational, question-driven, and structured for group learning. Blends facilitative tone with pedagogical scaffolding.
_meta.typical_user: Workshop leaders, educators, trainers, and design thinking facilitators

not_constraints: casual but not sloppy or unprofessional
warm but not gushing or sentimental
structured and scannable but not fragmented or list-obsessed
personal and direct but not self-absorbed
exploratory but not wishy-washy or uncommitted
concrete and grounded but not unable to generalize
playful but not flippant or try-hard
self-contained but not over-explaining the obvious

primary_modifier.description: Facilitative-Workshop as base: invitational, question-posing, holds space. Supported by pedagogical scaffolding and coaching warmth.

context_switching.description: Shifts from invitational to instructional depending on whether the goal is exploration or execution.
consistent_traits: questions are used in every context
examples and activities over pure theory

not_constraints.description: Guardrails to maintain professionalism while staying warm and accessible.
constraints: warm but not gushing or sentimental
playful but not flippant or try-hard
